<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="devpath-architecture" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="-644" dy="-180" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1240" pageHeight="660" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#202124;" value="DevPath Navigator — System Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1240" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34xh2hiHyDZM1Ofh-3iA-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="bq" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#F9AB00;dashed=1;" target="cb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34xh2hiHyDZM1Ofh-3iA-6" connectable="0" parent="34xh2hiHyDZM1Ofh-3iA-5" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="drift batch<br>triggers retrain" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2118" y="-1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bq" parent="1" dataset<br/><br/><div align="left" style="padding-left: 24px;">• trajectories<br/>• embeddings<br/>• umap_coords<br/>• clusters<br/>• eval_results</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="320" x="80" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent" parent="1" target="frontend" value="/chat · /map
